SEARCH
Package io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.commands

Class CommandException

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Throwable
java.lang.Exception
java.lang.RuntimeException
io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.commands.CommandException
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class CommandException extends RuntimeException
Exception that wraps a command request and an optional underlying cause. Used to propagate command execution errors while retaining context about the command that failed. The underlying cause can be another exception that triggered the command failure. Provides methods to unwrap nested CommandExceptions and retrieve the original cause. Also includes a utility method to execute a supplier and unwrap any CommandException thrown, rethrowing the underlying cause if present.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CommandException(CommandRequest<?,?,?> commandRequest)
    Creates a new CommandException with the given command request and no underlying cause.
    CommandException(CommandRequest<?,?,?> commandRequest, @Nullable RuntimeException cause)
    Creates a new CommandException with the given command request and optional underlying cause.

    @Nullable RuntimeException

  • Constructor Details

    • CommandException

      public CommandException(CommandRequest<?,?,?> commandRequest, @Nullable RuntimeException cause)
      Creates a new CommandException with the given command request and optional underlying cause.
      Parameters:
      commandRequest - the command request that caused the exception
      cause - the underlying cause of the exception, may be null

    • CommandException

      public CommandException(CommandRequest<?,?,?> commandRequest)
      Creates a new CommandException with the given command request and no underlying cause.
      Parameters:
      commandRequest - the command request that caused the exception

  • Method Details

    • getCommandRequest

      public CommandRequest<?,?,?> getCommandRequest()
      Gets the command request that caused this exception.
      Returns:
      the command request

    • getNestedCause

      public CommandException getNestedCause()
      Unwraps nested CommandExceptions to retrieve the deepest underlying CommandException.
      Returns:
      the deepest nested CommandException

    • getCause

      public @Nullable RuntimeException getCause()
      Overrides getCause to return a RuntimeException, which is the expected type of underlying causes.
      Overrides:
      getCause in class Throwable
      Returns:
      the underlying cause as a RuntimeException, or null if none

    • getUnderlyingCause

      public @Nullable RuntimeException getUnderlyingCause()
      Retrieves the original underlying cause by unwrapping nested CommandExceptions.
      Returns:
      the original underlying RuntimeException cause, or null if none

    • unwrap

      public static <T> @Nullable T unwrap(Supplier<T> supplier)
      Executes the given supplier and unwraps any CommandException thrown, rethrowing the underlying cause if present.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of result supplied
      Parameters:
      supplier - the supplier to execute
      Returns:
      the result from the supplier, or null if a CommandException was thrown without an underlying cause
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if a CommandException was thrown with an underlying cause
